metadata.strategy: paper-informed Korean conservative MFR + strong preserve rules + context-aware target prompt

thresholds.note: Direct MFR is intentionally conservative because many Korean slang/profanity/meme tokens are context-dependent or should be preserved in MultiLexNorm-style annotation.

papers_used: Google-trickers, Yaminjeongeum, and Leetspeak: taxonomy of intentionally noisy Korean UGT
Korean Morphologically Tight-Fitting Tokenizer for Noisy UGT
paper_informed_changes: Treat intentional noisy Korean text as potentially meaningful community text, not automatic normalization target.
Preserve laughter/emotion/backchannel compatibility-jamo tokens by default.
Avoid over-segmenting or rewriting proper nouns, named entities, coinages, and internet slang.
Use context-aware prompt for offensive/slur/euphemization candidates; title/context sensitivity in KOLD motivates context-first handling.
Use target-only output and protected-token guard from common_prompt.py.
